title: Tun oruko akowole re se
subtitle: Ṣe imudojuiwọn aabo akọọlẹ rẹ
requirements: Gbọdọ ni 8+ chars, uppercase, smallcase, nomba, & chash special

messages.error: Aṣiṣe kan ṣẹlẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
messages.failed: Kuna lati mu ọrọ igbaniwọle dojuiwọn
messages.required: Gbogbo awọn aaye ni a beere
messages.invalid: Ọrọigbaniwọle gbọdọ ni o kere ju awọn ohun kikọ 8, nla kan, kekere kan, nọmba kan ati ohun kikọ pataki kan
